results.name: All YAML contracts parse without errors
results.command:
python3 -c "
import yaml, sys
files = [
  'contracts/agent-tools.yaml',
  'contracts/event-catalog.yaml',
  'contracts/agent-config-map.yaml',
  'contracts/verification-gates.yaml',
  'contracts/upgrade-actions.yaml',
  'contracts/tooling.lock'
]
for f in files:
  try:
    with open(f) as fh:
      data = yaml.safe_load(fh)
    assert data is not None, f'{f} loaded as None'
  except Exception as e:
    print(f'FAIL: {f} — {e}')
    sys.exit(1)
print(f'{len(files)} contracts parsed successfully')
"

results.name: 7 runtime tables match Go struct field names (column-level)
results.command:
# validation_pipelines: g2_spec (NOT g2_spec_approved), scoring_payload, packaging_retries
psql -c "\d validation_pipelines" | grep -q 'g2_spec ' &&
psql -c "\d validation_pipelines" | grep -q scoring_payload &&
psql -c "\d validation_pipelines" | grep -q packaging_retries &&
! psql -c "\d validation_pipelines" | grep -q g2_spec_approved &&
# scan_accumulators: TEXT PK, expected (NOT expected_agents), reports INT
psql -c "\d scan_accumulators" | grep -q 'scan_id.*text' &&
psql -c "\d scan_accumulators" | grep -q 'expected ' &&
psql -c "\d scan_accumulators" | grep -q 'reports.*integer' &&
! psql -c "\d scan_accumulators" | grep -q expected_agents &&
# pipeline_receipts: status + error (NOT result)
psql -c "\d pipeline_receipts" | grep -q 'status.*text' &&
psql -c "\d pipeline_receipts" | grep -q 'error' &&
! psql -c "\d pipeline_receipts" | grep -q 'result' &&
# pending_dedup: dedup_event_id TEXT PK, name, payload
psql -c "\d pending_dedup_candidates" | grep -q 'dedup_event_id.*text' &&
psql -c "\d pending_dedup_candidates" | grep -q 'payload.*jsonb' &&
# runtime_config: config snapshot
psql -c "\d runtime_config" | grep -q config_yaml &&
# pipeline_processed_events: event_id PK only
psql -c "\d pipeline_processed_events" | grep -v handler | grep -q event_id &&
# template_prompt_drafts: has source, notes, created_at
psql -c "\d template_prompt_drafts" | grep -q source &&
psql -c "\d template_prompt_drafts" | grep -q notes &&
# agent_sessions index includes scope_key (expression-based, check via pg_indexes)
psql -c "SELECT indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE indexname='idx_sessions_active'" | grep -q 'scope_key'

results.name: Live DB schema matches canonical DDL
results.command: command -v empire >/dev/null 2>&1 && empire db diff --canonical contracts/ddl-canonical.sql || { echo 'UNVERIFIED: empire CLI not available'; exit 0; }

results.name: No UUID type references for agents.id (it is TEXT)
Every event in catalog has a delivery_channel value
results.command:
python3 -c "
import yaml
catalog = yaml.safe_load(open('contracts/event-catalog.yaml'))
events = {k: v for k, v in catalog.items() if isinstance(v, dict) and 'emitter' in v}
missing = [k for k, v in events.items() if not v.get('delivery_channel')]
assert len(missing) == 0, f'Missing delivery_channel: {missing}'
print(f'{len(events)} events, all have delivery_channel')
"

results.name: Every catalog emitter is a real agent or system component
results.command:
python3 -c "
import yaml
agents = yaml.safe_load(open('contracts/agent-tools.yaml'))
catalog = yaml.safe_load(open('contracts/event-catalog.yaml'))
agent_ids = {aid for aid, a in agents.items() if isinstance(a, dict) and 'type' in a}
system_emitters = {'runtime', 'system', 'human', 'timer', 'eventbus', 'dashboard', 'actor-agent', 'inbound-gateway'}
valid = agent_ids | system_emitters
invalid = []
for evt_name, e in catalog.items():
  if not isinstance(e, dict) or 'emitter' not in e:
    continue
  emitter = e.get('emitter', '')
  if emitter not in valid and not emitter.startswith('scanner-') and not emitter.startswith('opco-'):
    invalid.append(f'{evt_name}: {emitter}')
assert len(invalid) == 0, f'Unknown emitters: {invalid}'
print(f'All emitters are valid ({len(agent_ids)} agent IDs + system emitters)')
"
results.output: All emitters are valid (28 agent IDs + system emitters)

results.name: Every roster agent has a system_prompt in config
results.command:
python3 -c "
import yaml
config_map = yaml.safe_load(open('contracts/agent-config-map.yaml'))
errors = []
for agent_id, info in config_map.get('agents', {}).items():
  path = info.get('config_path')
  if path is None:
    continue  # ephemeral agents have no config file
  import os
  if not os.path.exists(path):
    errors.append(f'MISSING FILE: {path} for {agent_id}')
    continue
  with open(path) as f:
    content = f.read()
  if 'system_prompt' not in content and 'prompt:' not in content:
    errors.append(f'NO PROMPT: {path} for {agent_id}')
if errors:
  print('\\n'.join(errors))
  exit(1)
print(f'{len(config_map[\"agents\"])} agents checked')
"

results.name: Agent config filenames follow convention
results.command:
python3 -c "
import yaml, os
config_map = yaml.safe_load(open('contracts/agent-config-map.yaml'))
errors = []
count = 0
for agent_id, info in config_map.get('agents', {}).items():
  path = info.get('config_path')
  if path is None:
    continue
  count += 1
  if not os.path.exists(path):
    errors.append(f'Missing: {path} for {agent_id}')
if errors:
  for e in errors: print(e)
  exit(1)
print(f'{count} agent configs found')
"
